title: pnpm
description: Fast, disk space efficient package manager for JavaScript projects.

entries.label: Install all dependencies
entries.description: Installs all dependencies from lockfile. Uses content-addressable store.

entries.label: Add a package
entries.description: Adds a package to dependencies. Use -D for devDependencies, -w for workspace root.

entries.label: Run a script
entries.description: Runs a script defined in package.json. Use pnpm <script> as shorthand.

entries.label: Build the project
entries.description: Runs the build script. Recursively builds all workspace packages with --recursive.

entries.label: Prune store
entries.description: Removes unreferenced packages from the content-addressable store to free disk space.

entries.label: Why is a package installed
entries.description: Shows which packages depend on the given package and why it was installed.

entries.label: Check for outdated packages
entries.description: Lists packages that have newer versions available. Supports --long format.

entries.label: Audit for vulnerabilities
entries.description: Checks installed packages for known security vulnerabilities. Use --fix to auto-resolve.

entries.label: Run without installing
entries.description: Runs a package command without installing it globally. Like npx but for pnpm.

entries.label: Run in all workspace packages
entries.description: Runs a script across workspace packages matching a filter pattern.
